name: Fixed Deposits
description: A savings product offered by banks where you deposit money for a fixed period at a predetermined interest rate, providing guaranteed returns.
advantages: Guaranteed returns with fixed interest rate
Very low risk - principal amount is secure
Deposit insurance protection (up to certain limits)
disadvantages: Lower returns compared to market-linked investments
Money locked in for the tenure - early withdrawal penalties apply
Returns may not beat inflation over long term
Opportunity cost if market rates rise
examples: Cumulative FDs (interest compounded and paid at maturity)
